display.purpose: Rare page-level hero numerals; not a per-section reflex.

shadows.name: focus-ring
shadows.purpose: Keyboard focus / active input; always visible.

breakpoints.name: mobile
breakpoints.note: Ad-hoc; no breakpoint token file exists.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Default primary action; the one place indigo fills a control.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: var(--brand-primary, #6366f1); color: #fff; font-weight: 500; font-size: 0.9rem; line-height: 1; padding: 0.55rem 0.9rem; border: none; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: var(--brand-primary-hover, #4648c6); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(99,102,241,0.25); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.6; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: #e6ebf0; color: var(--text, #0f172a); font-weight: 500; font-size: 0.9rem; line-height: 1; padding: 0.55rem 0.9rem; border: none; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s ease; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #dbe2e8; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(99,102,241,0.25); }

components.name: Danger Button
components.description: Destructive action inside delete drawers / confirms.
components.css: .ds-btn-danger { background: #dc2626; color: #fff; font-weight: 500; font-size: 0.9rem; line-height: 1; padding: 0.55rem 0.9rem; border: none; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s ease; } .ds-btn-danger:hover { background: #b91c1c; } .ds-btn-danger:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(220,38,38,0.2); }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard text field used across forms and drawers.
components.css: .ds-input { background: var(--card-bg, #fff); color: var(--text, #0f172a); font-size: 0.95rem; padding: 0.62rem 0.85rem; border: 1.5px solid var(--border, #cbd5e1); border-radius: 8px; width: 100%; transition: border-color 0.15s ease, box-shadow 0.15s ease; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #64748b; } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: var(--brand-primary, #6366f1); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(99,102,241,0.25); } .ds-input:disabled { opacity: 0.6; background: var(--hover-bg, #f1f5f9); }

components.name: Card
components.description: Content surface for grouped info; never nested.
components.css: .ds-card { background: var(--card-bg, #fff); color: var(--text, #0f172a); border: 1px solid var(--border, #e2e8f0); border-radius: 12px; padding: 1.5rem; box-shadow: 0 2px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.03); transition: box-shadow 0.15s ease, transform 0.15s ease; } .ds-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.08); transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-card h3 { font-weight: 600; font-size: 1.25rem; margin: 0 0 0.25rem; } .ds-card p { color: #475569; margin: 0; }

components.name: Status Badge
components.description: Pill status indicator; color always paired with a dot + label.
components.css: .ds-status { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 999px; } .ds-status__dot { width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%; background: currentColor; opacity: 0.9; } .ds-status--success { background: #d1fae5; color: #065f46; }

components.name: DataTable Row
components.description: Standard table shell with sticky header and 56px rows.
components.css: .ds-table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; border: 1px solid var(--border, #e2e8f0); border-radius: 12px; overflow: hidden; background: var(--card-bg, #fff); } .ds-table thead th { position: sticky; top: 0; background: var(--hover-bg, #f1f5f9); text-align: left; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.04em; text-transform: uppercase; opacity: 0.72; padding: 12px 24px; min-height: 44px; } .ds-table tbody td { padding: 12px 24px; height: 56px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border, #e2e8f0); color: var(--text, #0f172a); transition: background 0.18s ease; } .ds-table tbody tr:hover td { background: var(--hover-bg, #f1f5f9); }

components.name: Right-side Drawer
components.description: SystemDrawer — the CRUD surface; never a centered modal.
components.css: .ds-drawer { width: 520px; max-width: 100%; height: 100%; background: var(--card-bg, #fff); box-shadow: -4px 0 24px -4px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); display: flex; flex-direction: column; } .ds-drawer__hd { padding: 1.25rem 1.5rem; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border, #e2e8f0); font-weight: 600; font-size: 1.125rem; } .ds-drawer__body { padding: 1.5rem; overflow-y: auto; flex: 1; }

narrative.overview: CataloGlobe Admin is a dependable business tool that disappears into the task. Its users are restaurant and shop owners — largely non-technical, often 40+, on a phone in-store — plus staff who live in the live Orders board during a shift. The interface earns trust by being calm, legible, and predictable: slate neutrals carry the surface, and the indigo brand color appears only where action, selection, or state actually happen. It is fully theme-aware (light + dark, both AA), Stripe-dashboard dense without legacy-POS crowding, single-family Inter on a fixed rem scale, with short 150-250ms state motion and no page-load choreography.
keyCharacteristics: Slate neutrals carry the surface; indigo marks action/selection/state only.
One type family (Inter), fixed rem scale, no fluid heading clamps.
Theme-aware: light + dark, both AA, tuned for older eyes on phones.
Soft, shallow elevation; depth grows with layer distance from the page.
Motion is feedback (150-250ms), never decoration or choreography.

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Indigo is the only accent. It marks action, current selection, and state — never decoration. On any screen it should touch ≤10% of the surface.

rules.name: The No-Color-On-Inactive Rule
rules.body: Inactive, disabled, and resting elements are neutral. Saturation is a signal; spending it on idle chrome makes real signals unreadable.

rules.name: The One Family Rule
rules.body: Inter does everything. No second UI face for display flavor — no serif headings, no Sora/Outfit in labels or data. Contrast comes from weight and size.

rules.name: The Fixed-Scale Rule
rules.body: Headings use fixed rem steps, never fluid clamp(). Users view at consistent DPI; a heading that shrinks in a sidebar looks worse.

rules.name: The Flat-At-Rest Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat or near-flat at rest. Elevation is a response to layering and state (hover, focus, floating), not a default decoration.

dos: Do carry surfaces on slate neutrals and spend indigo only on action, current selection, and state (≤10% of a screen).
Do keep body text ≥4.5:1 (large/bold ≥3:1) in both themes; hold placeholder text to the same 4.5:1.
Do size for older eyes on phones: comfortable body sizes, tap targets ≥44px.
Do use one family (Inter) at fixed rem steps; get contrast from weight and size.
Do keep motion to 150-250ms state feedback, with a prefers-reduced-motion fallback on every animation.
Do pair every semantic color with a non-color cue (dot, icon, label).
Do put all CRUD in a right-side SystemDrawer; ship every control with default/hover/focus/active/disabled states.
donts: Don't ship the generic AI/SaaS template: no gradient hero-metric cards, no purple-gradient decoration, no identical icon-card grids, no tiny tracked-uppercase eyebrows.
Don't drift toward the cluttered legacy POS: no gray-on-gray chrome, unlabeled dense toolbars, or 2010-era enterprise heaviness.
Don't over-animate: no bouncy/elastic easing, no decorative motion, no page-load choreography.
Don't use background-clip:text gradient text, border-left/right >1px colored side-stripes, or glassmorphism as a default surface.
Don't introduce a second UI font, a fluid clamp() heading, or a color not already in this palette.
Don't put color or full-saturation accents on inactive/disabled states.
Don't use a centered modal for CRUD, add a top navbar, or write CSS inline.
